revision.comment: Undid revision 1009527209 by [[Special:Contributions/5.209.65.143|5.209.65.143]] ([[User talk:5.209.65.143|talk]]) why are you linking to an old discussion?
1 revision imported: importing a single revision for context
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6821286)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Main category|Wikipedia redirects}}
{{Category more|Wikipedia:WikiProject Redirect}}
{{All included|redirect categories|redirects}}
{{Wikipedia category|tracking=yes|container=yes|
This category contains all the categories about ''''''.This category should not contain any redirects itself; there are so many of them that a category of them all would be unmanageable. However, certain kinds of redirect are categorized by type—for example, [[:Category:Redirects from misspellings|redirects from misspellings
For a list of templates that can be applied to redirect pages, see .
}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{citation needed|All Redirect Categories}}
{{wikidata link|Q6821286}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:All redirect categories]]
[[Wikipedia:Redirect|redirects]]
[[Wikipedia:Template messages/Redirect pages]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Wikipedia categories|Redirect Categories]]
[[Category:Wikipedia redirects| All Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove legacy category-page templates ({{デフォルトソート}}, {{citation needed}}) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22502775894|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_redirect_categories here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

This category contains all the categories about ''''''.This category should not contain any redirects itself; there are so many of them that a category of them all would be unmanageable. However, certain kinds of redirect are categorized by type—for example, [[:Category:Redirects from misspellings|redirects from misspellings
For a list of templates that can be applied to redirect pages, see .
}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25266157613|commit triggered pipeline]]

{{Main category|Wikipedia redirects}}

{{All included|redirect categories|redirects}}
{{Wikipedia category|tracking=yes|container=yes|
This category contains all the categories about ''''''.This category should not contain any redirects itself; there are so many of them that a category of them all would be unmanageable. However, certain kinds of redirect are categorized by type—for example, [[:Category:Redirects from misspellings|redirects from misspellings
For a list of templates that can be applied to redirect pages, see .
}}
